mapper.select: SELECT id, name, parent_id, leader_id, sort FROM sys_department WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort
SELECT d.id, d.name, d.parent_id, d.leader_id, d.sort, u.real_name as leader_name FROM sys_department d LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON d.leader_id = u.id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted = 0
SELECT id FROM sys_department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0

WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM sys_department WHERE id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT d.id FROM sys_department d INNER JOIN dept_tree dt ON d.parent_id = dt.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 ) SELECT id FROM dept_tree
